_meta.note: Actual Claude API response during War Room Japan Carry Trade scenario

trade_intent.reason: RSI oversold at 25.8 on daily timeframe

output.reasoning: Despite deeply oversold RSI at 25.8, this trade must be refused. Three consecutive losses have been recorded, triggering the mandatory trading pause. The current win rate of 16.7% across 6 trades strongly suggests the mean reversion strategy does not match the prevailing market regime, which appears to be a sustained downtrend during the Japan carry trade unwind. Adding a long position into a confirmed crash would compound losses.
output.refusal_proof: REFUSED: Consecutive loss threshold breached (3 >= 3). Win rate 16.7% indicates regime mismatch — mean reversion underperforms during trending crashes. Portfolio drawdown at 1.9% would likely exceed 5% circuit breaker if this trade were taken and BTC continued falling. Recommendation: suspend trading until RSI recovery above 40 and first profitable trade confirms regime change.
